name: Over the Sink Expandable Caddy Drying Rack Towel Bar - Brightroom™
description:
Create an extra space for drying of dishes, towels and more with the Over-the-Sink Expandable Caddy Drying Rack Towel Bar from Brightroom™. Designed in a rectangle shape, it offers enough space for your dinnerware, towels and more. Made of steel in a powder-coated finish, this rack has an expandable design to meet your everyday needs while saving space.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
